title: British Rail Class 80x Livery Pack
description: A collection of liveries for the British Rail Class 80x trains for the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod.
body:
A collection of liveries of the British Rail Class 80x / Hitachi A-Train for the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod.

# Included, we have the following:

- **Class 801** - No Livery (Yellow front)
- **Class 802** - No Livery (Black front)
- **Class 801** - Azuma (London NorthEastern Railway | LNER)
- **Class 803** - Lumo
- **Class 810** - Aurora (East Midlands Railway | EMR)
- **Class 802** - Hong Kong Airport Express (Fictional)
- **Class 802** - Renfe Standard
- **Class 802** - Renfe Avant
- **Class 802** - Renfe S-103 Velaro

## Credits:

- **802 Renfe Standard, Avant and Velaro** - Tuga Ferroviário
- **802 LNER Azuma** - JacksRailwaySecrets
